x-enumeration-literals.name: Disbursement Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Payments made to a claimant or beneficiary.

Claim payout
Refnd to policyholder
Partial payment
Lump sum settlement

x-enumeration-literals.name: Third-Party Payment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Payments made directly to service providers.

Funeral home payment
Repatriation service payment
Medical examiner fee
Transport provider fee

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reversal or Adjustment Transaction
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Financial corrections post-payment.

Payment reversal
Overpayment correction
Additional payment due to reassessment
